matrix.ac_text: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
Invalid product codes must be rejected.
Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
Only valid state transitions are allowed.
Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Order created successfully via UI when order date, customer, and one line item are provided

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: API creates order successfully when all required fields and one line item are provided in POST request

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: API creates order with multiple line items to confirm at-least-one rule with alternate valid data

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: UI displays inline validation errors when order date, customer, and line item are all left blank

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: API rejects order creation request when customer_id is missing from payload

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Unauthenticated request to create order endpoint is rejected with 401

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: No order record is persisted in database when required fields are missing and API returns 400

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Order with order date, customer, and exactly one line item with quantity 1 accepted as boundary minimum

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Order created successfully when all line items contain valid product codes via UI

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: API creates order successfully when all product codes are valid

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: UI displays inline validation error when entering an invalid product code in the line item

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: API rejects order creation when request contains a non-existent product code

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Unauthenticated API request to create order with invalid product code is rejected with 401

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Database does not persist order line item when product code foreign key constraint is violated

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: ETL pipeline rejects and logs order records containing invalid product codes during batch import

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: API rejects order when one of multiple line items contains an invalid product code while others are valid

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Taxable product line item displays correct tax amount calculated at 8.25% on order creation via UI

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: API order creation returns correctly calculated tax for taxable product in JSON response

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: API order creation with mixed taxable and multiple tax-rate line items calculates tax only on taxable items

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Database stores correct tax amount and tax rate for taxable product order line

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: UI displays non-taxable product with $0.00 tax when added as order line item

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Unauthorised API request to create order with taxable product is rejected with HTTP 401

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Non-taxable product results in zero tax amount in API order creation response

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Tax calculation rounds correctly for fractional cent boundary on a $0.01 taxable line item

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order created via UI triggers event visible in downstream fulfillment integration dashboard

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation via API publishes event to message broker with correct order payload

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Database order_events table records event row with correct status upon order creation

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event with multiple line items carries all line items in the outbound ETL payload

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Unauthorised API request to create order is rejected and no integration event is published

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: API order creation with invalid customer ID still does not publish an integration event

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: ETL pipeline transforms order amounts from cents to dollars in outbound integration payload

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Downstream message broker unavailability triggers retry and logs failure event in order_events table

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Valid transition from Created to Processing updates order status successfully via UI

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Valid transition from Processing to Shipped succeeds via API with correct response

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Valid transition from Shipped to Delivered succeeds via API with alternate valid data

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Database records valid state transition with audit trail and previous status preserved

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Invalid transition from Delivered to Processing is rejected with inline error in UI

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Unauthorised user without order:update scope is rejected when attempting status transition via API

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Invalid backward transition from Shipped to Created is rejected via API with error details

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Transition to a non-existent status value is rejected via API with validation error

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Cancelled order status remains unchanged when Shipped is selected via UI — transition is blocked with error message

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Confirmed order transitions to Shipped successfully via UI — valid state transition proceeds without error

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: API allows transition of confirmed order ORD-50400 to Shipped — valid transition returns HTTP 200

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Unauthenticated API request to transition cancelled order to Shipped is rejected with HTTP 401

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: API rejects PUT request to transition cancelled order ORD-50321 to Shipped with HTTP 422 and error detail

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Database constraint prevents direct UPDATE of cancelled order ORD-50321 status to Shipped

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: ETL pipeline rejects inbound record attempting to set cancelled order ORD-50321 to Shipped and logs rejection

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Rapid consecutive API requests to transition cancelled order to Shipped are all rejected — no race condition bypass

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Order status change from Pending to Shipped reflects in reporting dashboard and triggers email notification

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: API status update to In Transit persists in reporting data and publishes notification event

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Alternative valid status update to Delivered generates reporting entry and SMS notification

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: ETL pipeline extracts status update events and loads them into reporting data warehouse within SLA

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: UI reporting shows no status update row when invalid order ID is filtered

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Status update with disabled notification service still persists in reporting but logs notification failure

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Unauthorised API request to update order status is rejected and no reporting or notification records are created

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Database records status history and notification audit trail after rapid consecutive status updates
